backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for CycleTrack that manages user cycle data, preferences, sexual activity entries, and fertility phase calculations, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades existing user records from OldUserData (no sexual activity field) to NewUserData by adding an empty sexualActivity list to each user entry.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—the Intimacy page UI and its React Query hooks—to their respective source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the build plan.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the CycleTrack React SPA that mounts the app into a root div and loads the Vite entry script.
frontend/public/appConfig.json: Static app configuration file containing metadata, default cycle settings, the full rose/blush/cream OKLCH theme palette, fertility phase colors, feature flags, and environment identifiers.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes including the new /intimacy route, wrapped in ThemeProvider and a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CycleCalendar.ts: Interactive monthly calendar component that renders cycle phase-colored day cells with fertility and ovulation indicators, supporting month navigation and a phase legend.
frontend/src/components/CycleEntryForm.t: A form component for logging or editing a menstrual cycle entry with start/end date inputs, validation (max 10-day duration), and submit/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/CycleHistoryList: Displays a sorted list of past cycle entries as cards, supporting inline editing via CycleEntryForm and deletion with an alert dialog confirmation.
frontend/src/components/EducationTopicCa: An expandable card component that shows an educational topic's title, summary, and detailed sections, with color theming based on the topic's color property.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with logo, responsive navigation links (desktop and mobile drawer), and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
A settings form for configuring cycle length, luteal phase length, and reminder days, with validation and a live cycle phase preview.
frontend/src/components/PrivacyNotice.ts: A static informational component that communicates the app's privacy guarantees, highlighting on-chain data ownership, no third-party sharing, and decentralized storage.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog shown to new users for entering their name to create a profile, using the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/ReminderCard.tsx: Displays a styled card for an upcoming cycle event (period, fertile window, ovulation, safe period) with an icon, badge, date, description, and days-until countdown.
frontend/src/components/SafeSexStatusInd: Renders a color-coded status indicator (safe, caution, or unsafe/fertile) based on the user's current cycle phase, with loading and empty states.
Displays a single sexual activity log entry with protected/unprotected status, date, notes, and inline edit/delete actions via dialogs.
frontend/src/components/SexActivityEntry: Form component for logging or editing a sexual activity entry, capturing date, protection status toggle, and optional notes.
frontend/src/data/educationalContent.ts: Defines static educational content data covering menstrual cycle phases, fertility, and related topics, structured as typed topics with sections.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor calls including user profile, cycle entries, current cycle day, fertility phases, and related CRUD mutations with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers with CSS custom properties for light/dark themes and cycle-phase color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/cycleUtils.ts: Utility functions for date/nanosecond conversions, date formatting, and calculating upcoming menstrual cycle events (next period, ovulation, fertile window, safe period) from cycle entries and user preferences.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CycleLog.tsx: Page component for logging and managing menstrual cycle entries, showing an add-entry form and cycle history list with update/delete support, gated behind authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main authenticated dashboard page showing the user's cycle day, current fertility phase, upcoming events, and a cycle calendar, with a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/pages/Education.tsx: Education page that renders a list of expandable health topic cards sourced from static educational content data, with a medical disclaimer footer.
frontend/src/pages/Intimacy.tsx: Authenticated page for logging, updating, and deleting sexual activity entries, displaying today's safe-sex status and a chronological list of past entries.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, and a login/get-started button that authenticates via Internet Identity and redirects to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Reminders.tsx: Authenticated reminders page that calculates and displays upcoming cycle events within the next 30 days based on logged entries and user preferences.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Authenticated settings page allowing users to update cycle preferences via a form, view privacy information, and see app version details.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (DM Sans, Playfair Display), and an extended color palette using OKLCH values for a rose/blush/cream wellness app theme.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for an iOS menstrual cycle tracking app, listing existing features, architectural notes, and versioning metadata for build planning.
